Professional Turf Sports Arena in Kharar

Call NowView Location

Welcome to Tri-Sports Academy

Tri-Sports Academy Kharar is a modern turf sports facility designed for sports lovers. Whether you want to play cricket with friends or enjoy football matches, our professional turf ground offers the perfect environment for fun and fitness.

Our facility provides safe, high-quality turf, fencing for secure gameplay, and powerful night lights for evening matches.

Sports Available

Cricket Turf

Play exciting box cricket matches with friends on our professional turf.

Football Turf

Enjoy fast-paced football games on our high-quality synthetic turf field.

Our Facilities

Expert Coaching

Skill Development & Fitness

Box Cricket & Friendly Matches

Professional Turf Ground

Night Lighting

Safe Fenced Ground
